title: Guns
questions: Do you own a gun? If so, what do you use it for?
In your opinion, is it a basic human right for people to be able to own, carry and use guns?
How old must you be to buy a gun in your country? Do you think this age limit is right?
How easy or difficult is it for people in your country to buy a gun?
Is it better to keep guns at home or at gun clubs?
In your opinion, do people have the right to shoot intruders in their home?
Do you think there should be a limit on the number of guns one person can own? If so, what do you think would be a reasonable number?
Are hunting, shooting and target practise popular pastimes in your country? Why do you think this is?
Have you ever been in a situation where you have had to stick to your guns? What happened?
Do you know anyone who had a shotgun wedding? What was it like?
Have you ever jumped the gun in a situation? What happened?
Gun ownership is quite common in many countries but gun violence seems most prevalent in the United States of America. Why do you think this is?
In your opinion, what can be done to reduce gun-related crimes?
To what extent do you think the film and music industries glorify guns?
What do you think can be done to prevent people going on killing sprees and shooting large numbers of members of the public (e.g Hungerford, UK, Virginia Tech, USA)?
